text:

Author: bdrewery

Log:
  - Update to 0.5.10.2 [1]
  - Update comment on the real problem with UNUSABLE_RT_SIGNALS.  This is
    avoiding a buffer overflow due to NSIG*2 being far smaller than
    SIGRTMAX.
